run_summary.summary: Flexsteel content was shot at Steinhafels on Apr 23, but Kenny forgot to apply to the PopFly campaign after returning home and emailed Ian today to reopen the window — this is the fourth time the application window has needed to be reopened. The deal is real ($2,500/post, contract signed), content exists, but it won't officially register until the PopFly application goes through. Also: Mariah followed up asking Liz to upload the caption for the Smart Solar/Linkind video to the Drive folder (new since last run). And the weekly agency check-in explicitly confirms Aleve's 3x IG Reels ($12k) are under content approval — logging that for the record.

suggestions.message: Kenny emailed Ian (ian@popfly.com) today to reopen the Flexsteel/Steinhafels PopFly application window — again. Content was shot at Steinhafels on Apr 23! The PopFly application is the last blocker. If Ian doesn't respond by Monday, consider calling him directly at 801.787.0976.

deals.next_action: Apply to Flexsteel campaign on PopFly once Ian reopens the application window
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Kenny and Liz visited Steinhafels (Downers Grove, IL) on Apr 23 and shot content. Kenny forgot to apply to the PopFly campaign after getting home. Emailed Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com, 801.787.0976) to reopen the application window — 4th reopening. Formal campaign submission on PopFly still needs to happen before content can be uploaded for review. Deliverables: 2 video posts ($2,500/post). Contract signed Mar 25.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Content shot at Steinhafels on Apr 23 — Kenny forgot to apply to PopFly campaign, asked Ian to reopen window again

deals.next_action: Finish editing Linkind SP6 video and upload both video and caption to Drive folder
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Mariah asked Liz to upload the caption to the Drive folder in addition to the video. Liz confirmed actively editing content. Delivery needed by Mon/Tue Apr 27-28. Drive folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1AAus-zWzTyGIHFWMuPvwDUFqJu3jDdni
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Mariah requested caption upload to Drive alongside video — Liz actively editing, due Mon/Tue

deals.next_action: Follow up on content approval if no word by Mon Apr 27
